concerns.text: Plan.md identifies 'Critical Blocking Issue' - no verified datasets exist in verified-datasets block. Plan's Dataset Acquisition Strategy Step 3 requires 'Add the verified URL(s) to the project's # Verified datasets block.' No task exists to search for, verify, and add datasets to this block. Pipeline will halt without this prerequisite task.

SC-007 requires compute feasibility measured against 14 GB disk space constraint. T036 mentions 'within 14 GB disk space (SC-007)' in description but no task validates export stays within limit before completion. Coverage gap for SC-007 verification.

SC-002 requires ANOVA statistical validity measured against normality/homogeneity assumptions. T023 implements Welch's ANOVA fallback for skewed distributions but no task explicitly tests for assumption violations before applying fallback. Coverage gap for SC-002 verification.
